Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. Remove all modern
businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- camera: eye-level, facing street-facing, fov 80
- main street road, 2-lane, asphalt
- sidewalks present, curbs present
- driveways: alley entrance mid-block; parking: parallel street parking both sides
- two-story brick commercial building at left block face, 2 stories, red brick, cast iron storefront columns, flat parapet roof, at sidewalk setback
- single-story retail building at center block face, 1 story, brick, plate glass storefront, flat with low parapet roof, at sidewalk setback
- corner mixed-use building at right corner, 3 stories, brick, stone trim cornice, flat roof, at sidewalk setback
- utilities: overhead power and telephone lines, wooden utility poles every 50 feet
- landscape: concrete sidewalks, brick pavers at crosswalks, small planted tree pits
- immutable elements: cast iron storefront columns on left building, recessed corner entrance on right building, brick alley mid-block
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 1975
Post-Vietnam, oil crisis era. A working small-town main street in 1975 — locally owned shops with hand-painted and neon signs, a five & dime, and not a single modern chain in sight.

PERIOD DETAILS
- local diner with a hand-lettered 'HOT COFFEE 25¢' sign in the window
- appliance store window displaying console televisions with a 'COLOR TV' placard
- shoe repair shop with a small 'SHOE REPAIR — WHILE U WAIT' sign
Typography: bold sans-serif, slab serif, occasional script.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 11 people, spread out with empty areas.
- a teenager leaning on a bicycle near the curb
- a mother holding a child's hand walking past the drug store
Clothing: men in wide lapels, bell bottoms; women in wide leg pants, midi skirts. No posing or eye contact.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 4 period vehicles, all different:
- 1973-1980 Chevrolet C10 — square body, chrome bumper
- 1971-1976 Chevrolet Impala — full-size, chrome rear bumper
- 1975-1979 Chevrolet Monza — small hatchback, rare but present
- 1971-1976 Plymouth Fury — full-size, vinyl roof common
Parked with gaps; optionally 1 driving; no vehicle newer than 1975.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, no rumble strips
- utilities: overhead power lines everywhere, wooden utility poles standard

TREES
- oak tree at sidewalk left near corner: very young sapling
- maple tree at sidewalk center in front of retail: very young sapling

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
STRICTLY BLACK AND WHITE — true monochrome archival photograph, zero color anywhere.
Grain: visible fine grain. Style: documentary, natural light.
Photorealistic, like a preserved newspaper-archive frame; slight period-lens softness, not digitally sharp.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
SelectedVehicles: 1973-1980 Chevrolet C10 — square body, chrome bumper
1971-1976 Chevrolet Impala — full-size, chrome rear bumper
1975-1979 Chevrolet Monza — small hatchback, rare but present
1971-1976 Plymouth Fury — full-size, vinyl roof common
